name: Ubuntu
onCreateCommand: sudo bash -lc 'usermod -aG ares vscode 2>/dev/null || true; chmod -R g+rwX,o-rwx /home/ares; chmod g+s /home/ares'
postCreateCommand: curl -1sLf 'https://dl.cloudsmith.io/public/tofuutils/tenv/cfg/setup/bash.deb.sh' | sudo bash && sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y tenv python-is-python3 nginx redis-server && sudo usermod -aG ares www-data && sudo chmod -R a+rX /var/www/html
postStartCommand: ln -sfn /workspaces/aiares/aresmush /home/ares/aresmush && ln -sfn /workspaces/aiares/ares-webportal /home/ares/ares-webportal && sudo service nginx start && sudo service redis-server start
